description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named External Repo: System Reference that triggers on push to devel and release branches and on pull requests to these branches, ignoring certain file paths. The workflow first determines the target branch, then performs cross-compilation on an ubuntu-22.04 environment. It checks out the fprime-system-reference repository, overlays the current F´ revision, sets up the F´ environment, installs meson and ninja, sets up the RPI toolchain, builds libcamera, generates a System Reference build cache, and builds the System Reference for Raspberry Pi.
